sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10851" key="a)nupe/rartos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυπέρ-αρτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n10851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not ostentatious,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν δαπάναις καὶ παρασκευαῖς ἀ.</foreign> Andronic.Rhod.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0562.tlg001:p.576M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.576M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
